Config.UseMod.Name: Enable Mod
Config.RequireMet.Name: Require NPC Introduction
Config.RequireMet.Tooltip: Only allow gifting through doors after you have met the NPC.
Config.FriendshipMultiplier.Name: Friendship Multiplier
Config.FriendshipMultiplier.Tooltip: Friendship points multiplier applied when gifting through a door. A value of 1.0 matches normal gifting. Default is 0.25.
Config.FriendshipMultiplier.Text: NOTE: Birthday gifts are not affected and will always be treated as though gifted in person.
Door.GiftOffer.Single: Would you like to leave {{item}} for {{npc}}?
Door.GiftOffer.Multiple: Would you like to leave {{item}} for someone inside?
Door.GiftOffer.Multiple.Who: Who would you like to give it to?
